translations.hi: नाच जल्द शुरू होने वाला है.
translations.ja: ダンスはもうすぐ始まります。

sentences.target: Ich liebe den Tanz aus dem Film.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈliːbə deːn tants aʊs deːm fɪlm/

translations.de: Ich liebe den Tanz aus dem Film.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈliːbə deːn tants aʊs deːm fɪlm/
translations.en: I love the dance from the movie.
translations.es: Me encanta el baile de la película.
translations.fr: J'adore la danse dans le film.
translations.yue: 我好鍾意電影入面嗰段舞。
translations.pt: Eu adoro a dança do filme.
translations.vi: Tôi thích điệu nhảy trong bộ phim.
translations.nl: Ik hou van de dans uit de film.
translations.hi: मुझे फिल्म का डांस बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Λατρεύω τον χορό από την ταινία.
translations.id: Aku sangat suka tarian di film itu.
translations.ja: 映画の中のダンスが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; expresses the action.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'liebe'.
Preposition governing dative; marks source/origin.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of the prepositional object.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Der Tanz macht allen heute richtig Spaß.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ tants maxt ˈalən ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈʁɪçtɪç ʃpaːs/

translations.de: Der Tanz macht allen heute richtig Spaß.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ tants maxt ˈalən ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈʁɪçtɪç ʃpaːs/
translations.en: The dance is really fun for everyone today.
translations.es: Hoy todos se están divirtiendo mucho con el baile.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, tout le monde s'amuse beaucoup en dansant.
translations.it: Oggi tutti si divertono davvero con il ballo.
translations.ko: 오늘은 모두가 춤추는 게 정말 재미있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天大家跳舞玩得特别开心。
translations.yue: 今日大家跳舞玩得好開心。
translations.pt: Hoje todo mundo está se divertindo muito com a dança.
translations.tr: Bugün herkes dans etmekten gerçekten çok keyif alıyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ai cũng thấy nhảy múa thật vui.
translations.nl: Vandaag heeft iedereen veel plezier met het dansen.
translations.hu: Ma mindenki nagyon élvezi a táncot.
translations.hi: आज सब लोग नाच का खूब मज़ा ले रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dziś wszyscy świetnie się bawią przy tańcu.
translations.el: Σήμερα όλοι περνούν πραγματικά καλά με τον χορό.
translations.nb: I dag har alle det skikkelig gøy med dansen.
translations.id: Hari ini semua orang benar-benar bersenang-senang dengan tarian.
translations.sv: Idag har alla riktigt roligt med dansen.
translations.ro: Astăzi toată lumea se distrează de minune cu dansul.
translations.cs: Dnes si všichni tanec opravdu užívají.
translations.da: I dag har alle det rigtig sjovt med dansen.
translations.fi: Tänään kaikilla on tosi hauskaa, kun tanssitaan.
translations.ja: 今日はみんながダンスを本当に楽しんでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; light verb in the expression 'Spaß machen'.
Indefinite pronoun, dative plural; indirect object/experiencer ('to everyone').
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame of the event.
Degree/intensifier adverb; modifies the predicate ('Spaß machen') to indicate high degree.
Common noun, accusative (bare object) in a light-verb construction; complement of 'macht'.

sentences.target: Im Park beginnt ein Tanz für Kinder.
sentences.reading: /ɪm paʁk bəˈgɪnt aɪ̯n tants fyːɐ̯ ˈkɪndɐ/

translations.de: Im Park beginnt ein Tanz für Kinder.
translations.ipa: /ɪm paʁk bəˈgɪnt aɪ̯n tants fyːɐ̯ ˈkɪndɐ/
translations.en: A dance for children starts in the park.
translations.es: En el parque empieza un baile para niños.
translations.fr: Un cours de danse pour enfants commence au parc.
translations.it: Nel parco inizia un ballo per bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 公园里开始了一个儿童舞蹈活动。
translations.yue: 公園有個小朋友跳舞活動開始啦。
translations.ru: В парке начинается танец для детей.
translations.pt: No parque começa uma dança para crianças.
translations.tr: Parkta çocuklar için bir dans başlıyor.
translations.vi: Một buổi nhảy cho trẻ em bắt đầu ở công viên.
translations.nl: In het park begint een dans voor kinderen.
translations.uk: У парку починається танець для дітей.
translations.hu: A parkban gyerekeknek szóló tánc kezdődik.
translations.hi: पार्क में बच्चों के लिए एक डांस शुरू होता है.
translations.pl: W parku zaczyna się taniec dla dzieci.
translations.el: Στο πάρκο ξεκινά ένας χορός για παιδιά.
translations.nb: I parken begynner en dans for barn.
translations.id: Di taman, tarian untuk anak-anak dimulai.
translations.sv: I parken börjar en dans för barn.
translations.ro: În parc începe un dans pentru copii.
translations.cs: V parku začíná tanec pro děti.
translations.da: I parken begynder en dans for børn.
translations.ja: 公園で子ども向けのダンスが始まります。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition ('in' + definite article 'dem'); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'Im'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; clause predicate (verb-second with fronted PP).

Common noun, masculine nominative singular; grammatical subject occurring after the verb.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a beneficiary phrase.
Common noun, plural accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.
